global_description: A medium-sized bird with a sleek, elongated body and glossy black plumage. It features vibrant red and yellow patches on its wings, a pointed black beak, and slender legs. The bird's feathers have a smooth, shiny texture.

part_details.wings: Glossy black with bright red and yellow patches, elongated and smooth.
part_details.beak: Pointed, sleek, and black, matching the overall plumage.
part_details.legs: Slender, black, supporting the bird's body.
part_details.body: Sleek, elongated, covered in glossy black feathers.

spatial_relations: The red and yellow patches are located on the upper part of the wings.
The pointed beak extends from the front of the head.
The slender legs are positioned under the body, supporting it.
